output.code:
# Load the text_to_analyse.txt to examine content and compute spans
path = '/mnt/data/file-7gmhkS1316Xqpesu6oUAH5-text_to_analyse.txt'
with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    text = f.read()
len(text), text[:5000]

text = open('/mnt/data/file-7gmhkS1316Xqpesu6oUAH5-text_to_analyse.txt', 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()
# find all occurrences of double quotes characters "
spans = []
start = 0
while True:
    i = text.find('"', start)
    if i == -1:
        break
    j = text.find('"', i+1)
    if j == -1:
        break
    spans.append((i+1, j))  # exclusive of quotes
    start = j+1
len(spans), spans[:10]

quoted_texts = [(s,e,text[s:e]) for s,e in spans]
quoted_texts

queries: وَقَالَ شُعَيْبٌ يَا قَوْمِ لَا تَسْأَلُونِي أَعْظِمَ مِنْهُمْ وَأَنَا لَكُمْ نَاصِحٌ مُّبِينٌ
وَمَا لِيَ لَا أَعْبُدُ الَّذِي فَطَرَنِي وَإِلَيْهِ تُرْجَعُونَ
أَفَرَأَيْتُمْ إِنْ أَتَاكُمْ عَذَابُهُ بَيَاتًا أَوْ نَهَارًا
ثُمَّ كَيْفَ إِذَا حَضَرَتِ الْفَتْحَةُ يَوْمَئِذٍ يَغْلِبُ الْمُتَّقُونَ
وَإِلَىٰ مَدْيَنَ أَخَاهُمْ شُعَيْبًا قَالَ يَا قَوْمِ
الرجفة فأصبحوا في دارهم جاثمين الأعراف
الاعراف 88 استكبر الذين استكبروا من قومه

content.text: {"citations":[{"span_start":166,"span_end":544,"span_text":"وَقَالَ شُعَيْبٌ يَا قَوْمِ لَا تَسْأَلُونِي أَعْظِمَ مِنْهُمْ وَأَنَا لَكُمْ نَاصِحٌ مُّبِينٌ * وَمَا لِيَ لَا أَعْبُدُ الَّذِي فَطَرَنِي وَإِلَيْهِ تُرْجَعُونَ * أَفَرَأَيْتُمْ إِنْ أَتَاكُمْ عَذَابُهُ بَيَاتًا أَوْ نَهَارًا مَّاذَا يَسْتَعْجِلُ مِنْهُ الْمُجْرِمُونَ * ثُمَّ كَيْفَ إِذَا حَضَرَتِ الْفَتْحَةُ يَوْمَئِذٍ يَغْلِبُ الْمُتَّقُونَ * عَلَىٰ أَعْدَائِهِمْ يَهْدُونَ","citation_type":"Aya","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{"sura_name":"","sura_number":0,"aya_number":0},"hadeeth_reference":{ "collection_name":"", "book_number":0, "hadith_number":0 },"corrected_text":"خطأ","completely_invalid":true},{"span_start":692,"span_end":942,"span_text":"وَلَمَّا جَآءَ أَمْرُنَا نَجَّيْنَا شُعَيْبًا وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ مَعَهُۥ بِرَحْمَةٍ مِّنَّا وَأَخَذَتِ ٱلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا۟ صَيْحَةً فَٱعْتَرَفُوا۟ بِذَنۢبِهِمْ أَنَّىٰ لَهُمُ ٱلْعَدُو۟ وَمَا۟ ٱلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا۟ كَانُوا۟ بِآيَٰتِنَا يُكَذِّبُونَ","citation_type":"Aya","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{ "sura_name":"", "sura_number":0, "aya_number":0 },"hadeeth_reference":{ "collection_name":"", "book_number":0, "hadith_number":0 },"corrected_text":"خطأ","completely_invalid":true},{"span_start":985,"span_end":1183,"span_text":"وَلَمَّا جَآءَ أَمْرُنَا نَجَّيْنَا شُعَيْبًا وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ مَعَهُۥ بِرَحْمَةٍ مِّنَّا وَأَخَذَتِ ٱلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا۟ صَيْحَةٌ فِي يَوْمٍ عَمِيٍّ عَمِيعٍ * وَكُلَّ شَيۡءٍ أَمَرَهُۥ فَبَدَا","citation_type":"Aya","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{ "sura_name":"", "sura_number":0, "aya_number":0 },"hadeeth_reference":{ "collection_name":"", "book_number":0, "hadith_number":0 },"corrected_text":"خطأ","completely_invalid":true}]}

citations.description: List of citations with details, validation, references, and per-citation corrections.

span_start.description: Inclusive start character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_end.description: Exclusive end character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_text.description: The text content of the citation span.

citation_type.description: Type of the citation: either Aya (Quran) or Hadeeth (Prophetic tradition).

is_valid.description: True if the cited Aya or Hadeeth is recognized and valid, false otherwise.

aya_reference.description: Quranic reference details (required if citation_type is Aya; empty object if not applicable).

sura_name.description: Name of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

sura_number.description: Number of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

aya_number.description: Number of the aya (verse) in the Quran.

hadeeth_reference.description: Hadeeth reference details (required if citation_type is Hadeeth; empty object if not applicable).

collection_name.description: Name of the Hadeeth collection in english (e.g. Sahih Bukhari, Muslim).

hadith_number.description: Hadith number within the specified book.

corrected_text.description: The corrected version of the citation text (or the text itself if it was correct in the first place) (e.g. if there are certain words that were invalid this version must have this corrected), or 'خطأ' for completely invalid citations (i.e. no close enough citation can be found to correct the text). If there are close texts in Quran or Hadith - but too far from the citation, this must be considered 'خطأ' and completely_invalid must be true.

completely_invalid.description: Set to true if the citation is completely invalid i.e. there can't be a close enough text to correct it, (corrected_text must be 'خطأ').
